turns.content: dude I think somethings wrong with my juul its hittin weird like barely any vapor comin out and I just bought new mango pods yesterday do you know how to fix this

Yeah, that's a pretty common Juul issue. A few things to try:

1. Pull the pod out and check the bottom contacts — sometimes juice leaks onto them. Wipe both the pod contacts and the ones inside the Juul with a dry Q-tip.
2. Try gently blowing into the bottom of the Juul (where the pod connects) to clear out any condensation.
3. Make sure the pod is clicking in all the way. Sometimes they sit slightly loose.

If none of that works, the battery might be dying. How old is the device?

its like maybe 4 months old I go through these things like crazy tho cuz I hit it literally all day long. im on a job site from like 6 to 4 and I swear I take a hit every 5 minutes its the only thing keepin me sane when im pullin wire in some basement for 10 hours

Ha, yeah if you're hitting it that hard all day, 4 months is actually a decent run for a Juul battery. They're not built for that kind of heavy use. The battery degrades pretty fast with constant use.

Honestly, at the rate you're going through them, you might want to consider grabbing a backup device so you always have one charged and ready. Or try cleaning the one you've got with a Q-tip and rubbing alcohol on the contacts — that usually buys some extra life. How many pods are you going through in a day?

probably like a pod and a half a day sometimes two if its a stressful day lol. mango is the only flavor I mess with tho everything else tastes like chemicals to me. I know its bad for me whatever my lungs are probably cooked but its better than smokin cigarettes at least thats what I tell myself

A pod and a half to two a day is definitely up there. At that rate you're spending what, like $25-30 a week on pods? That adds up fast.

You're right that it's generally considered less harmful than cigarettes, but that's a lot of nicotine. Each Juul pod has about as much nicotine as a pack of cigarettes, so you're basically doing 1.5-2 packs a day equivalent.

But hey, I'm not here to lecture you. For the immediate problem — try the Q-tip cleaning thing and see if that helps. If the device is just shot, at least you know you need a new one. Do you have a backup or would you need to go buy one?

nah I dont have a backup thats the problem if this thing dies im gonna be miserable tomorrow at work. theres a smoke shop near my place I could grab one tonight I guess but I already spent so much money this week

I feel you. Try the cleaning first before you spend any money — seriously, the Q-tip trick works more often than you'd think. Just pull the pod out, get a dry Q-tip in there and clean the gold contacts on both the pod and the device.

If you do need to buy a new one, some smoke shops sell the basic Juul device for like $10-15 without pods since you already have those. Way cheaper than a starter kit. Also, check if they have any deals on a two-pack of devices — sometimes it's barely more than one and then you'd have that backup for next time.

yeah thats true I just hate droppin money on another one when I already spent a ton on pods this month. do the off brand pods work in a juul or nah cuz my buddy was tellin me about some cheaper ones he gets

There are third-party compatible pods out there that fit the Juul, and some people swear by them. The quality varies a lot though — some are fine and some leak way more or have inconsistent flavor. If your buddy has a brand he likes, it's worth trying a pack to see how you feel about them. Just know that more leaking means more gunk on your contacts, which brings you right back to the problem you're having now.

Honestly I'd fix your current device first and then experiment with the cheaper pods as a separate thing. No point buying off-brand pods if your Juul itself is the issue.
ok lemme try the cleaning thing rn hold on

Go for it! Take the pod out, grab a Q-tip (dry first, rubbing alcohol if dry doesn't do it), and clean both sets of contacts. Also give a gentle blow into the device from the bottom to clear any gunk. Let me know how it goes.

YO that actually worked bro the hit is way better now I think it was just gunked up from all the juice leakin. youre a lifesaver dude I was about to have a real bad day tomorrow without this thing lol

Haha nice, glad that did the trick! Yeah, with how much you use it, juice buildup on the contacts is gonna happen pretty regularly. I'd say clean it like once a week and you'll avoid this problem.

Also a quick tip — if your pods are leaking a lot, try keeping them upright when you're not using them and avoid leaving the Juul in your pocket with the pod in on hot days. The heat makes the juice thin out and leak more. That'll keep your contacts cleaner longer.

thats good to know cuz it literally lives in my pocket all day on the site lol. appreciate the help bro I was legit stressin about this. gonna go rip this thing on the couch now and watch some youtube. peace
Ha, enjoy man. Just try to remember to clean it every week or so and it should keep running smooth. Have a good night!
